response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, currently working at Staff level with TypeScript and Node.js while building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — directly matching the role's unusual AI agent development requirement. Recent roles cover React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, GraphQL, and Kubernetes-deployable systems, and a deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Jest/Playwright, Kotlin, or Python, and a notable share of career depth is in the niche D language rather than the primary stack.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, a rare match for the required AI agent development skill
Long full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes
Strong engineering craft: TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed for the primary backend framework
Testing expertise is proven but not in the named tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright)
Kotlin and Python absent; Java exposure appears dated and secondary

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency in TypeScript/Node/React full-stack work
Missing named stack items (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, Python)
